sEn: RoboBrain 2.0 unifies perception, reasoning, and planning for embodied tasks, achieving leading results on spatial and temporal benchmarks.
sZh: RoboBrain 2.0 统一了具身任务的感知、推理与规划，在空间和时间基准测试中取得领先结果。
absEn: We introduce RoboBrain 2.0, our latest generation of embodied vision-language foundation models, designed to unify perception, reasoning, and planning for complex embodied tasks in physical environments. It comes in two variants: a lightweight 7B model and a full-scale 32B model, featuring a heterogeneous architecture with a vision encoder and a language model. Despite its compact size, RoboBrain 2.0 achieves strong performance across a wide spectrum of embodied reasoning tasks. On both spatial and temporal benchmarks, the 32B variant achieves leading results, surpassing prior open-source and proprietary models. In particular, it supports key real-world embodied AI capabilities, including spatial understanding (e.g., affordance prediction, spatial referring, trajectory forecasting) and temporal decision-making (e.g., closed-loop interaction, multi-agent long-horizon planning, and scene graph updating). This report details the model architecture, data construction, multi-stage training strategies, infrastructure and practical applications. We hope RoboBrain 2.0 advances embodied AI research and serves as a practical step toward building generalist embodied agents. The code, checkpoint and benchmark are available at https://superrobobrain.github.io.
absZh: 我们介绍了 RoboBrain 2.0，这是我们最新一代的具身视觉-语言基础模型，旨在统一物理环境中复杂具身任务的感知、推理与规划。它有两个版本：轻量级 7B 模型和全尺寸 32B 模型，采用异构架构，包含视觉编码器和语言模型。尽管体积紧凑，RoboBrain 2.0 在广泛的具身推理任务上表现出色。在空间和时间基准测试中，32B 版本均取得领先结果，超越了之前的开源和专有模型。特别是，它支持关键的具身 AI 能力，包括空间理解（如功能预测、空间指代、轨迹预测）和时间决策（如闭环交互、多智能体长时规划、场景图更新）。本报告详细介绍了模型架构、数据构建、多阶段训练策略、基础设施和实际应用。我们希望 RoboBrain 2.0 能推动具身 AI 研究，并朝着构建通用具身智能体迈出实际一步。代码、检查点和基准测试可在 https://superrobobrain.github.io 获取。

contrib.en: Introduces RoboBrain 2.0, a new generation of embodied vision-language foundation models unifying perception, reasoning, and planning.
contrib.zh: 提出 RoboBrain 2.0，新一代具身视觉-语言基础模型，统一感知、推理与规划。

contrib.en: Achieves leading results on spatial and temporal benchmarks, surpassing prior open-source and proprietary models.
contrib.zh: 在空间和时间基准上取得领先结果，超越此前开源和专有模型。

contrib.en: Supports key embodied AI capabilities: spatial understanding and temporal decision-making.
contrib.zh: 支持关键具身 AI 能力：空间理解与时间决策。

contrib.en: Details model architecture, data construction, multi-stage training strategies, infrastructure, and applications.
contrib.zh: 详述模型架构、数据构建、多阶段训练策略、基础设施与应用。

contrib.en: Provides two model variants (7B and 32B) with heterogeneous architecture for scalability.
contrib.zh: 提供两种模型变体（7B 和 32B），采用异构架构以实现可扩展性。

contrib.en: Releases code, checkpoints, and benchmarks to advance embodied AI research.
contrib.zh: 开源代码、检查点和基准，推动具身 AI 研究。

limits.en: Performance evaluated only on specific benchmarks; real-world generalization not fully tested.
limits.zh: 性能仅在特定基准上评估，未充分测试真实世界泛化。

limits.en: Model size (32B) may limit deployment on resource-constrained devices.
limits.zh: 模型规模（32B）可能限制在资源受限设备上的部署。

limits.en: Relies on pre-collected data; adaptation to novel environments may require fine-tuning.
limits.zh: 依赖预收集数据，适应新环境可能需要微调。

limits.en: Temporal decision-making capabilities are demonstrated but not extensively validated in long-horizon tasks.
limits.zh: 时间决策能力已展示，但在长周期任务中未广泛验证。
